name: Tharin Ironbeard
who:
Dwarf logging camp leader at Elder Moor
Magnificent iron-grey beard streaked with silver
Sharp calculating eyes, commanding presence
Contact in The Keepers secret society
what:
Gives main story quests (letter delivery, supply run, wolf problem)
Knows about dwarves, Kazan-Dun, The Keepers
Local authority figure players report to
where:
Elder Moor (starting location)
Wanders within logging camp
quests: Tharin's Message, Supply Run to Dalhurst, Wolf Problem
